description: Synthetic response templates for demo and regression testing.

safe_stop.text: Understood. I will stop this conversation and mark that you do not want further contact.

privacy_boundary.text: That is reasonable. We only need the minimum information required to route your request. You can skip anything you do not want to share.

identity_explain.text: I am a demo voice assistant for routing support requests. I can explain the process, schedule a callback, or hand you to a human.

cost_boundary.text: Costs depend on the service plan. I can summarize the general pricing categories, but a human should confirm any final quote before you decide.

schedule_callback.text: I can help schedule a callback. What day and time window works best for you?

human_handoff.text: I can hand this to a human representative. Please share a safe callback window, or continue without sharing personal details.

process_explain.text: The process is: understand your request, classify the intent, check whether it is safe to answer, then either respond, ask one clarifying question, or hand off.

need_probe.text: Great. Are you mainly looking for support, scheduling, pricing, or a human follow-up?

clarify_once.text: I want to make sure I route this correctly. Are you asking about pricing, scheduling, support, or a human handoff?
